title: huperzia dalhousieana
intro: Huperzia dalhousieana, also known as the Dalhousie fir moss or club moss, is a species of plant in the genus Huperzia, which belongs to the family Huperziaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Huperzia dalhousieana include its potential to improve cognitive function, boost immune system, and protect against neurodegenerative diseases. Huperzia dalhousieana is often prepared in herbal form as a powder or extract, which can be used in supplements, teas, or capsules for its medicinal benefits.
